title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows children playing at a playground. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Three children are playing at a playground in a park. One child is coming down a slide while two other children are waiting nearby. There are swings, trees and a parent sitting on a bench.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people buying ice cream. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A father and two children are buying ice cream from a small outdoor stand. One child is holding an ice cream cone and the other is choosing a flavour. There are pictures of ice cream, a menu board and people walking behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
